title: Richly Glazed Brazilian Cheese Sandwich
description: A citrusy and cheesy Brazilian dish featuring a lacquer glaze on a baguette, perfect for a post-workout snack. The combination of melted cheese and citrus glaze creates a delicious cheese-pull effect.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the baguette into 1-inch thick slices and place on a wooden board.
Butter each slice of baguette on the outside.
Slice the queijo coalho into thin slices and place on each baguette slice.
In a small bowl, whisk together the orange marmalade, lime juice, and honey to create the lacquer glaze.
Brush the lacquer glaze over the queijo coalho on each baguette slice.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Place the wooden board with the baguette slices under the broiler for 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the glaze is caramelized.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a minute before serving.
